since_last: 40% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +0.55%; AI bubble risk 51 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.14% · BTC +1.43% · Gold -0.40% · Nasdaq100 -0.05%. 40% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +0.55%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +0.55%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.49%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: RXRX is the standout at -6.39%
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -2.93% at $147.7
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -2.93% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 51 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 51/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
